Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1113 0 0}We can finally get back to living a normal life... But, honestly, it feels kinda weird.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, let's just have fun celebrating tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, I gotta stop by the archery team. I'll see you later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}Whew... I can finally concentrate on archery practice today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll motivate myself with the sushi we'll be having to practice a little harder.[n]{f 1 1}
